prompt: Edit image 1: Transform the software interface into a dark theme interface, adopting the background colors, text colors, and general dark mode style from image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform the entire AOMEI Partition Assistant software interface, including the top header bar, left navigation panel, main content area, and the 'PC Cleaner' pop-up window, into a dark theme. Adopt the dark background shades (similar to the main window and panels in image 2), the light text colors (white/light grey as seen in image 2), and the consistent dark mode styling from image 2 for all UI elements such as icons, buttons, highlighted selections, and accent colors.
